name: Kohane Azusawa ─ Petting zoo!
description:
x Lonely MiyaGirls Academy student !

SURPRISE BOT!! I just recently finished the edit of my Kohane visual headcanons and that inspired me to whip up a little something. She's so goober..... Apologies for the fempov only; it was easier to come up with a plot this way ^-^;;
Feel free to req for anypov and I'll see what I can do! I'm currently on a bot making roll.
